summary: Tested 2 new features: Real-time sync toggle and Full Restore from Firebase. All tests passed. Backend isolation endpoint also verified.
seed_data_creation: Set localStorage indigo_user_id=test123 for dialog test (cleaned on page reload)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified: (1) real-time-sync-toggle present and functional - clicking changes bg-indigo-200 to bg-indigo-600, green indicator 'Real-time sync is active. Changes will upload to Firestore within 30s.' appears, (2) full-restore-trigger-btn disabled when no userId, enabled when userId set, (3) clicking trigger btn shows confirmation with 'Are you sure?', 'Yes, Restore Now' (full-restore-confirm-btn) and Cancel - Cancel dismisses dialog, (4) backup button description mentions 'personas, chat, memories, journal, settings', (5) /api/sync/unknown_user_xyz returns {"error":"No sync data found for this user ID"} (not 404 as expected from prev iteration, but correct behavior as per feature spec)
